title: Floe Configuration
description: Configuration for floe worker sessions. Lives at .floe/config.json. Committed to git (no secrets — API keys stay in environment variables).

configured.description: Whether configuration has been completed. Set to true after the configure command runs.

srcRoot.description: Path to the project's application source root, relative to the project root (e.g. 'src'). Injected into implementer worker context so generated code lands in the right place. Omit if the project root is also the source root.

model.description: Model identifier for this role (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', 'o3-mini'). Omit for substrate default.
